2025-08

GatherStar Heading to Affiliate World Europe 2025: Meet Us in Budapest (Sept 4-5)

We're heading to Affiliate World Europe 2025—the world’s #1 performance marketing conference!

This event is where industry leaders share cutting-edge strategies, dissect the latest trends (like AI in programmatic and privacy-first advertising), and forge partnerships that fuel growth.


Event Details

  • Event: Affiliate World Europe 2025
  • Dates: September 4–5, 2025
  • Location: Budapest, Hungary

Who Will Be There

Our team of programmatic advertising experts will be present at AWEurope. Our experts can answer your questions, show you how our platform can solve your advertising challenges, and discuss potential strategies for your business. To set up a meeting, reach out to our Business Development Director, Lawrence, on Telegram: @lawrencexlee.

Why Talk to GatherStar?

GatherStar connects premium advertisers with publishers to unlock unlimited revenue. We're looking forward to reuniting with our amazing partners and meeting new ones along the way.

For Advertisers

  • Simplify Programmatic: Tired of programmatic complexity? We’ll show how GatherStar streamlines campaign setup to audience targeting, making it a breeze.
  • Maximize ROI: Our data-driven approach hones your ad spend. Reach the most relevant audiences and boost conversions.
  • Access Premium Inventory: Tap into our network of top-tier publishers. Get your ads on trusted, high-traffic sites to boost brand visibility.

For Publishers

  • Monetize Efficiently: We’ll help you unlock the value of your ad space. Match with high-intent advertisers and optimize earnings.
  • Partner With Quality Brands: Connect with reputable advertisers via our platform, ensuring brand safety and long-term partnerships.
  • Streamline Operations: From ad requests to payouts, we simplify workflows so you can focus on growing your platform.

Book a Meeting in Advance

Don't miss the opportunity to have a one-on-one conversation with our team. Book a meeting in advance with our Business Development Director, Lawrence, via Telegram (@lawrencexlee) to secure a dedicated time slot. This way, we can focus on your specific needs, whether you're looking to start with programmatic advertising, improve your existing campaigns, or explore new targeting options.

Let's connect, share ideas, and explore how GatherStar can take your advertising efforts to the next level.

See you in Budapest!


About GatherStar

GatherStar is a global programmatic advertising platform that links advertisers and publishers to drive unlimited growth. We excel in gaming, finance, and dating verticals. Committed to quality, GatherStar exclusively partners with verified traffic sources. Our top target regions include the United States, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Russia, and Latin America.
